motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def sortString(self, s: str) -> str:
    result = ""
    while len(s) > 0:
        smallest = min(s)
        result += smallest
        s.remove(smallest)

        largest = max(s)
        result += largest
        s.remove(largest)

    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
